# Dollr API Docs for AI Agents

This file is a machine-friendly index for AI agents using Dollr API documentation.
Canonical docs base: https://docs.heydollr.app
API base URL: https://api.heydollr.app
Version: v1
Last updated: 2026-04-25

## Product Summary
Dollr provides APIs for parties, invoices, orders, checkouts, sessions, executions, status tracking, payment accounts, links, predictions, fees, merchants, and realtime keys.

## Authentication
Use bearer token authentication on all protected endpoints:
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN

## Core Workflow Pages
- Quickstart: https://docs.heydollr.app/quickstart/
- Integration guide: https://docs.heydollr.app/guides/integration/
- Error handling: https://docs.heydollr.app/guides/error-handling/

## API Reference Index
- Parties: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/parties/
- Counterparties: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/counterparties/
- Invoices: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/invoices/
- Orders: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/orders/
- Checkouts: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/checkouts/
- Sessions: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/sessions/
- Executions: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/executions/
- Transaction status: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/status/
- Payment accounts: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/payment-accounts/
- Payment links: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/links/
- Predictions: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/predictions/
- Fees: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/fees/
- Merchants: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/merchants/
- Realtime keys: https://docs.heydollr.app/api/realtime-keys/

## Priority Endpoints For Agents
- GET /v1/predictions/amount-and-fees
- GET /v1/predictions/payment-source/amount-and-fees
- GET /v1/predictions/mmo-provider-info

## Agent Guidance
1. Read the Integration Guide before running payment flows.
2. Validate enum values exactly as documented in each endpoint page.
3. Use Predictions endpoints before creating payment operations when fees or FX may apply.
4. On non-2xx responses, consult the Error Handling guide and retry only when safe.
5. Prefer canonical page URLs above to avoid stale mirrors.

## Glossary
- https://docs.heydollr.app/reference/glossary/
